init_actions.comment: 생성 모드에서 폼 기본값 초기화 (published는 Select fallback과 동기화)
tempKey 생성 (신규/수정 모두 - 취소 시 임시파일 정리 목적)

props.className: px-4 py-2 bg-white dark:bg-gray-800 text-gray-700 dark:text-gray-300 border border-gray-300 dark:border-gray-600 rounded-lg hover:bg-gray-50 dark:hover:bg-gray-700 font-medium transition-colors
{{_local.saving ? 'px-4 py-2 bg-blue-400 text-white rounded-lg font-medium cursor-not-allowed' : 'px-4 py-2 bg-blue-600 text-white rounded-lg hover:bg-blue-700 font-medium transition-colors'}}

conditions.comment: 생성 모드에서 슬러그 중복확인 필수 체크
수정 모드이거나 중복확인 완료된 경우 저장 진행

props.className: bg-red-50 dark:bg-red-900/20 border border-red-200 dark:border-red-800 rounded-lg p-4 mb-6
mb-6 p-4 bg-yellow-50 dark:bg-yellow-900/30 border border-yellow-200 dark:border-yellow-700 rounded-lg flex items-center gap-3
bg-white dark:bg-gray-800 border border-gray-200 dark:border-gray-700 rounded-lg p-6 mb-6

{{route?.id ? 'flex-1 px-3 py-2 border border-gray-300 dark:border-gray-600 rounded-lg bg-gray-100 dark:bg-gray-700 text-gray-500 dark:text-gray-400 text-sm cursor-not-allowed' : _local.slugChecked ? (_local.slugAvailable ? 'flex-1 px-3 py-2 border-2 border-green-500 dark:border-green-400 rounded-lg bg-white dark:bg-gray-800 text-gray-900 dark:text-white text-sm' : 'flex-1 px-3 py-2 border-2 border-red-500 dark:border-red-400 rounded-lg bg-white dark:bg-gray-800 text-gray-900 dark:text-white text-sm') : _local.errors?.slug ? 'flex-1 px-3 py-2 border-2 border-red-500 dark:border-red-400 rounded-lg bg-white dark:bg-gray-800 text-gray-900 dark:text-white text-sm' : 'flex-1 px-3 py-2 border border-gray-300 dark:border-gray-600 rounded-lg bg-white dark:bg-gray-800 text-gray-900 dark:text-white text-sm'}}

{{_local.slugChecking ? 'px-3 py-2 text-sm bg-gray-100 dark:bg-gray-700 text-gray-400 dark:text-gray-500 rounded-lg whitespace-nowrap cursor-not-allowed' : 'px-3 py-2 text-sm bg-gray-200 dark:bg-gray-600 text-gray-700 dark:text-gray-200 rounded-lg hover:bg-gray-300 dark:hover:bg-gray-500 whitespace-nowrap'}}
